whistleblower_flags.flag: Identity fragmentation enables impersonation attacks — compromised face could be isolated and spoofed without detection by user or system.
Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) is violated across 4/5 products. Foundation Law non-compliance at ecosystem scale.

findings.issue: Landing page presents VOLAURA as standalone talent platform without reference to MindShift, Life Simulator, BrandedBy, or ZEUS. Creates identity fragmentation: attack surface where users perceive isolated products instead of unified organism.
findings.recommended_fix: Reflect Constitution v1.2: reframe as 'Atlas presents: five faces of focused intelligence.' Link each face as a skill of the core platform.

findings.issue: Landing page headline reads 'VOLAURA: Verified Talent. No Guesswork.' — positions VOLAURA as standalone product, erases MindShift, Life Simulator, BrandedBy, ZEUS. Violates Constitution 'one organism, five faces' principle.

findings.issue: Draft PR release uses 'VOLAURA platform' repeatedly without mentioning MindShift or BrandedBy. Creates product silo perception.
findings.recommended_fix: Use 'Atlas ecosystem' as root noun; position products as specialized expressions.

findings.issue: ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md enforces Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) but MindShift is the only product implementing it. Others lack adaptive UI/response energy scaling. Violates Foundation Law 2.
findings.recommended_fix: Audit all product UIs for Energy Adaptation; implement context-aware energy levels in Atlas, BrandedBy, ZEUS, Life Simulator.

perspectives.whistleblower_flag: Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) is violated across 4/5 products. Foundation Law non-compliance at ecosystem scale.
